title: The Wood Of Flowers (The Adventures Of Seumas Beg)
content:
I went to the Wood of Flowers
            (No one was with me);
        I was there alone for hours.
            I was happy as could be
        In the Wood of Flowers.

        There was grass on the ground,
            There were buds on the tree,
        And the wind had a sound
            Of such gaiety,
        That I was as happy
            As happy could be,
        In the Wood of Flowers.
meaning:
James Stephens's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "The Wood Of Flowers (The Adventures Of Seumas Beg)"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
